description: CompositionBlack three-quarter tights made of 100% polyester, has a soft and broad elasticated waistband with drawcords, reinforced stitching over the crotch area and other tear points, and brand logo at the right hipFittingSlimWash careGentle machine wash in cool waterDo not bleachTumble dry at low temperatureCool ironDo not dry cleanA split second can mean the difference between winning and losing. To ensure you're always on the winning side, this three-quarter tight from the puma Speed series is designed to give you that added advantage. Its state-of-the-art technology provides a form-fitted lightweight design. Pair it with a round neck T-shirt and sneakers.Model statisticsThe model wears three-quarter tights of length 28"Height: 5'7”; Waist: 25”; Hips: 35”
